meaning: n.菲帛罗(一种人造黏胶纤维)[商标名]
examples: Those who suspect they were warm-blooded point out that dinosaur bone is generally fibro-lamellar in nature.
Although modern reptiles generally do not form fibro-lamellar bone, juvenile crocodiles raised under optimal environmental conditions do.
Positive rate of chronic fibro-cavitary pulmonary tuberculosis was the highest.
